deep_dive.title: SPARK: Low Latency Single-Camera 3D Pose Estimation for Autonomous Racing using Keypoints
deep_dive.abstract: In autonomous racing, fast detection of other participants' movements is required to plan safe, collision-free trajectories with non-cooperative opponents. LiDAR detection is inherently slower and harder to deploy on edge devices than vision methods, causing delayed detections that limit object tracking performance during high-dynamic maneuvering. Utilizing monocular 3D detection enables an easy-to-deploy, low-latency detection of other participants on the racetrack. We present SPARK, a single-camera pose-estimation algorithm for autonomous racing using keypoint detection. It achieves long-range detection with high accuracy, exceeding the performance of state-of-the-art monocular camera detection algorithms while maintaining lower latency. By employing well-optimized YOLO models and leveraging the fixed geometry in the autonomous racing domain, the algorithm also exhibits low latency and resource usage. We evaluate the performance of our approach on real-world autonomous racing data and compare it to state-of-the-art LiDAR and camera detection algorithms. The source code is available at: https://github.com/TUMFTM/SPARK-camera-det
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于赛车的单目相机3D检测
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于赛车的单目相机3D检测
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于赛车的单目相机3D检测
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SPARK achieves low-latency single-camera 3D pose estimation for autonomous racing using keypoint detection, outperforming state-of-the-art monocular detectors.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对自动驾驶赛车场景中LiDAR检测延迟高的问题，提出SPARK单目相机3D位姿估计算法，利用关键点检测实现远程高精度检测，在保持低延迟的同时超越现有单目检测方法，证明了纯视觉3D检测在高速动态环境中的可行性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对自动驾驶赛车场景中LiDAR检测延迟高的问题，提出SPARK单目相机3D位姿估计算法，利用关键点检测实现远程高精度检测，在保持低延迟的同时超越现有单目检测方法，证明了纯视觉3D检测在高速动态环境中的可行性。

quick_skim.title: Fully Distributed Multi-View 3D Tracking in Real-Time
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-camera tracking with overlapping fields of view typically relies on centralized fusion, which creates computational bottlenecks that prevent deployment at scale. We present MV3DT, a fully distributed framework for real-time multi-view 3D tracking that achieves accurate identity propagation and occlusion recovery through peer-to-peer coordination, eliminating the need for central aggregation. Each camera node executes a lightweight modular pipeline comprising monocular 3D perception, distributed multi-view association, and collaborative fusion via lightweight messaging. MV3DT achieves 96.5% IDF1, 93.1% MOTA, and 94.6% MOTP on WILDTRACK, competitive with state-of-the-art centralized methods, and unprecedented 41.7% IDF1 and 50.9% MOTA on SCOUT while demonstrating superior scalability: sustaining 30 FPS on 100 cameras with <10ms inter-camera latency and only 2.2% communication overhead. MV3DT operates in a zero-shot regime given camera calibrations, requiring no scene-specific learning and making it directly deployable in new environments. These results establish MV3DT as a practical solution for real-time multi-view tracking in large-scale overlapping camera networks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: distributed multi-view 3D tracking using cameras only
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 分布式多视角纯相机3D跟踪
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 分布式多视角纯相机3D跟踪
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 分布式多视角纯相机3D跟踪
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: MV3DT is a fully distributed multi-view 3D tracking framework using only cameras, achieving real-time performance and competitive accuracy on WILDTRACK and SCOUT datasets.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对集中式多相机3D跟踪的计算瓶颈，提出完全分布式框架MV3DT，每个相机节点独立执行单目3D感知并通过点对点协调实现多视角关联与融合，在WILDTRACK和SCOUT数据集上达到与集中式方法相当的精度，并展示了可扩展性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对集中式多相机3D跟踪的计算瓶颈，提出完全分布式框架MV3DT，每个相机节点独立执行单目3D感知并通过点对点协调实现多视角关联与融合，在WILDTRACK和SCOUT数据集上达到与集中式方法相当的精度，并展示了可扩展性。

quick_skim.title: Fully Distributed Multi-View 3D Tracking in Real-Time
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-camera tracking with overlapping fields of view typically relies on centralized fusion, which creates computational bottlenecks that prevent deployment at scale. We present MV3DT, a fully distributed framework for real-time multi-view 3D tracking that achieves accurate identity propagation and occlusion recovery through peer-to-peer coordination, eliminating the need for central aggregation. Each camera node executes a lightweight modular pipeline comprising monocular 3D perception, distributed multi-view association, and collaborative fusion via lightweight messaging. MV3DT achieves 94.3% IDF1 and 93.3% MOTA on WILDTRACK, competitive with state-of-the-art centralized methods, while demonstrating superior scalability by sustaining 30 FPS on 100 cameras with less than 10 ms inter-camera latency and only 2.2% communication overhead. MV3DT operates in a zero-shot regime given camera calibrations, requiring no scene-specific learning and making it directly deployable in new environments. These results establish MV3DT as a practical solution for real-time multi-view tracking in large-scale overlapping camera networks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-view 3D tracking from cameras; method transferable to camera-only 3D detection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多视角相机3D跟踪，方法可迁移至纯视觉3D检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多视角相机3D跟踪，方法可迁移至纯视觉3D检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多视角相机3D跟踪，方法可迁移至纯视觉3D检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Distributed multi-view 3D tracking with monocular perception and peer-to-peer fusion achieves high accuracy and scalability, enabling real-time 100-camera tracking at 30 FPS.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有集中式多视角3D跟踪在大规模部署时受限于计算瓶颈。本文提出MV3DT，一种完全分布式的实时多视角3D跟踪框架，通过单目3D感知、分布式关联和协作融合实现身份传播和遮挡恢复。在WILDTRACK上取得94.3% IDF1和93.3% MOTA，在100相机上以30 FPS运行，展示了与集中式方法相当的精度和更好的可扩展性。该工作为分布式多相机3D感知提供了高效方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有集中式多视角3D跟踪在大规模部署时受限于计算瓶颈。本文提出MV3DT，一种完全分布式的实时多视角3D跟踪框架，通过单目3D感知、分布式关联和协作融合实现身份传播和遮挡恢复。在WILDTRACK上取得94.3% IDF1和93.3% MOTA，在100相机上以30 FPS运行，展示了与集中式方法相当的精度和更好的可扩展性。该工作为分布式多相机3D感知提供了高效方案。

quick_skim.title: SurroundNEXO: Ego-Centric Metric Bridging for Spatially Consistent Geometry in Autonomous Driving
quick_skim.abstract: Modern autonomous driving depends on accurate metric 3D understanding for perception, reconstruction, and planning, which in turn requires reliable multi-camera depth prediction. However, the outward-facing nature of vehicle-mounted surround-view camera rigs inherently limits visual overlap across views, challenging the correspondence-based assumptions that underpin conventional multi-view geometry. To bridge this gap, we present SurroundNEXO, named after the Spanish word nexo for a geometric link, a low-overlap multi-camera metric depth framework that grounds cross-view reasoning in ego-centric geometry rather than dense visual correspondences. Instead of directly enforcing early global fusion, SurroundNEXO first assigns image tokens globally comparable ego-frame viewing directions through Ego-Ray Positional Encoding, then uses sparse LiDAR measurements as metric anchors to propagate absolute scale cues, and finally expands feature interaction progressively from view-local modeling to decomposed spatio-temporal reasoning and global integration. This design enables metric-scale depth prediction with improved spatial consistency across weakly overlapping cameras. Across low-overlap autonomous driving benchmarks, including NuScenes, Waymo and DDAD, SurroundNEXO reduces single-view error by 33.2%, improves cross-view consistency by 10.5%, and enhances metric reconstruction quality by 25.6% compared with SOTA methods. It further remains robust under extremely sparse depth prompts and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen camera layouts.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-camera metric depth for autonomous driving, enables visual 3D perception without LiDAR
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，支持无LiDAR的视觉3D感知
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，支持无LiDAR的视觉3D感知
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于自动驾驶的多相机度量深度，支持无LiDAR的视觉3D感知
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SurroundNEXO proposes a metric depth framework for low-overlap multi-camera setups in autonomous driving, using ego-centric geometry instead of visual correspondences to achieve spatially consistent 3D reconstruction without LiDAR.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 自动驾驶中，环绕相机视觉重叠小，传统多视图几何难以适用。为此，SurroundNEXO提出一种基于自车几何桥接的低重叠多相机度量深度框架，先为每张图像独立预测深度，再通过自车运动融合获得空间一致的三维几何。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于现有方法，无需LiDAR即可实现精确的3D感知，为纯视觉自动驾驶感知提供了新的使能技术。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 自动驾驶中，环绕相机视觉重叠小，传统多视图几何难以适用。为此，SurroundNEXO提出一种基于自车几何桥接的低重叠多相机度量深度框架，先为每张图像独立预测深度，再通过自车运动融合获得空间一致的三维几何。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于现有方法，无需LiDAR即可实现精确的3D感知，为纯视觉自动驾驶感知提供了新的使能技术。
